items.summary: During his speech, Trump reiterated that the U.S. objectives in Iran were almost met and said that "we have all the cards" in the conflict.

items.headline: Oil prices surge with Brent rising 5% as Trump vows to hit Iran 'extremely hard' within weeks

items.headline: Stock futures sink as Trump says U.S. on track to complete Iran objectives ‘very shortly’
